case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. VS. LETITIA CIANCI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $173.65 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CIANCI, LETITIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
